# UC-12.2.31 · Argo CD Stuck Sync with Running Operation State

## Description

Long-running syncs often indicate API server slowness, CRD webhooks, or network partitions.

## Value

Identifies sync operations that exceed a 15-minute window for operator intervention.

## Implementation

Poll application status every 60s; tune threshold per environment. Join with Kubernetes API latency metrics if ingested.

## SPL

```spl
index=devops sourcetype="argocd:application"
| where operation_state="Running" OR phase="Running"
| eval age_sec=now()-_time
| where age_sec > 900
| table _time, name, namespace, operation_state, phase, revision, age_sec
| sort -age_sec
```

## Visualization

Table (stuck apps), Gauge (max age_sec).

- [Argo CD Splunk integration notes](https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/wiki/Splunk)
